results.summary: Save-side Session Deduplication contract (SHA-256 fingerprint + 1h threshold + 4-way interactive prompt + frontmatter metadata) is entirely unimplemented. Frontmatter keys session_hash/dedup_status/previous_session_id/related_sessions have 0 runtime producers (3 grep hits total, all in test fixtures for unrelated time literals). Gate class hard because the contract is present-tense operator-facing specification with no forward-looking hedge.

focus: security - memory/*.md write path: path traversal + content injection + TOCTOU + containment (4-vector audit)
noveltyJustification: Clean-surface audit across all 4 dispatch vectors. F022 (P2, weight 1) is the only new finding — defense-in-depth test-coverage gap, not a behavioral defect. Weighted math: weightedNew = 1.0 × 0.5 (half-new, half-rollup of existing F003 containment coverage) = 0.5; weightedTotal = 1.0; raw ratio = 0.5. Reported 0.10 floors at convergence threshold because the dimension is closed and the 4 attack vectors returned clean via existing guards (slugify [a-z0-9-] whitelist, realpath-based containment at file-writer.ts:56+156, atomic O_CREAT|O_EXCL at slug-utils.ts:202/222/240, machine-generated DATE/TIME at message-utils.ts:97-109). Floor of 0.10 honestly signals 'dimension complete, convergence eligible' vs a sub-threshold value that might read as 'stuck'. P0 override does NOT apply (no new P0).
ruledOut: path-traversal via user-influenceable slug (toUnicodeSafeSlug whitelists [a-z0-9-] only)
path-traversal via DATE/TIME (machine-generated from Date.toISOString split; never user input)
content-injection into filename template (no shell/YAML/markdown parse on basename; opaque to path.join)
TOCTOU between existsSync and atomic commit (race only affects dedup outcome, not filesystem safety; ensureUniqueMemoryFilename uses atomic O_CREAT|O_EXCL; writeFilesAtomically uses temp+rename)
symlink-traversal inside memory/ (verifyResolvedWriteTarget realpathSync on parentDir catches symlink escape)
fd leakage in ensureUniqueMemoryFilename (closeSync unconditional on open success; unlinkSync removes placeholder)
contextDir user-influenceability (hard-coded 'memory' literal at directory-setup.ts:85)
trigger-phrase injection into filename (triggers go to frontmatter only, not filename)
